description_long: This object is a classic desktop computer setup featuring a CRT monitor, a tower-style CPU, a full-sized keyboard, and a mouse, all arranged on a rectangular black mat. The monitor has a boxy, off-white plastic casing with a thick bezel framing the display, which shows a colorful operating system interface. The CPU tower is similarly colored, with visible drive bays and ventilation grilles on the front. The keyboard is standard, with a numeric keypad and function keys, and the mouse is a simple, rounded design. The overall appearance is reminiscent of late 1990s to early 2000s office or home computer setups. The materials and design suggest durability and utilitarian function, suitable for public or semi-public urban environments such as libraries, community centers, or offices.
description: A vintage desktop computer setup with a CRT monitor, tower CPU, keyboard, and mouse on a black mat. The monitor features a thick bezel and a colorful display interface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the CRT monitor's screen, thick bezel, keyboard, mouse, and the front of the CPU tower.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the monitor and CPU, with the keyboard and mouse visible to the left.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the depth of the monitor and CPU, as well as the drive bays and ventilation grilles on the CPU.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view showing the back of the monitor and the keyboard positioned to the right.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thick, boxy, and made of off-white plastic with sharp corners and a matte finish, providing a utilitarian and robust frame around the display area.
attribute_stand_type: The monitor rests on a flat, integrated base that is part of the monitor's casing, rectangular in shape and made of the same off-white plastic, with no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: Physical buttons are located on the lower right front edge of the monitor bezel, grouped together for easy access.
